result.stdout:
Usage: versioning <command> [...arguments]

versioning tool

Commands:
  get-version  get current version from git repository
  set-version  set version tag in git repository

commands.payload:
Usage: versioning <command> [...arguments]

versioning tool

Commands:
  get-version  get current version from git repository
  set-version  set version tag in git repository

result.stdout:
Usage: versioning get-version [-v|-version-chain <version-chain>] [-w|-working-directory <working-directory>]

get current version from git repository

Options:
  -v, -version-chain?      Version chain in Major.Minor format (e.g., 1.2). If not specified, returns the latest version across all chains.
  -w, -working-directory?  Working directory.

result.stdout:
Usage: versioning set-version [-w|-working-directory <working-directory>] -v|-version <version>

set version tag in git repository

Options:
  -w, -working-directory?  Working directory.
  -v, -version             Version to set.
